mapper.select: SELECT PLC_NO AS plcNo, PLC_ID AS plcId, PLC_CAT_CD AS plcCatCd, PLC_NAME AS plcName, PLC_OVERVIEW AS plcOverview, PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS plcMainImgUrl FROM PLACE WHERE PLC_RGN_CD = #{regionCode} AND PLC_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CASE WHEN PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL IS NOT NULL AND PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL != '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, PLC_NO DESC
